terms_of_service_text:
1. Anti-Fraud & Payment Security

Dev Boot Finder employs advanced machine learning algorithms to detect and prevent fraudulent transactions. Users must provide accurate billing information and utilize authorized payment methods only.

Violation Consequence:

Any attempt to use stolen credit cards, initiate fraudulent chargebacks, or manipulate the payment gateway will result in an immediate, permanent account ban, cancellation of all pending orders, and potential IP blacklisting.

2. No Botting or Scalping

We believe in fair access to premium and limited-edition football boots for all players. The use of automated scripts, purchasing bots, scrapers, or exploits to bypass queues or rapidly purchase stock is strictly prohibited.

Violation Consequence:

If our systems detect bot-like checkout speeds or coordinated bulk purchasing for the purpose of reselling (scalping), the offending accounts will be instantly banned without warning.

3. Return Policy & "Wardrobing"

We offer a generous return policy to ensure you find the perfect fit. However, all returned boots must be in pristine, unworn, factory condition with all tags attached.

Violation Consequence:

Users caught "wardrobing" (wearing boots for a match or training session and returning them as "new") or making an excessively high volume of returns to exploit free shipping will have their purchasing privileges permanently revoked.

4. Zero Tolerance for Harassment

We strive to maintain a positive, professional community. Users must maintain respectful communication when interacting with the Support Desk, leaving product reviews, or engaging with other community members.

Violation Consequence:

Any use of profanity, threats, spam, or abusive language toward DBF staff or other users will result in an immediate account suspension or permanent ban.

5. Account Integrity

Your account is yours alone. Each user is permitted only one active account on the platform. Accounts cannot be sold, traded, or transferred to another individual under any circumstances.

Violation Consequence:

Creating multiple accounts to exploit promotional codes or referral systems, or attempting to sell a high-tier account, will result in the termination of all associated accounts.
